description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: From the parked domain search, use a given keyword to find related domains, filter to .com results, then add the cheapest option costing at most $15 per year to your cart with a 2-year registration.
tasks.name: From the parked domain search, use a given keyword to find related domains, filter to .com results, then add the cheapest option costing at most $15 per year to your cart with a 2-year registration.
tasks.description: From the parked domain search, use a given keyword to find related domains, filter to .com results, then add the cheapest option costing at most $15 per year to your cart with a 2-year registration.

tasks.instruction: Using the bulk domain search tool for several related domains, add all available .com or .net options priced under $12 per year to your cart.
tasks.name: Using the bulk domain search tool for several related domains, add all available .com or .net options priced under $12 per year to your cart.
tasks.description: Using the bulk domain search tool for several related domains, add all available .com or .net options priced under $12 per year to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Open the purchase inquiry form for the parked domain, fill in all required contact fields, make a mid-range three-digit USD offer for a small business website use case, opt in to similar domain opportunities, and submit the inquiry.
tasks.name: Open the purchase inquiry form for the parked domain, fill in all required contact fields, make a mid-range three-digit USD offer for a small business website use case, opt in to similar domain opportunities, and submit the inquiry.
tasks.description: Open the purchase inquiry form for the parked domain, fill in all required contact fields, make a mid-range three-digit USD offer for a small business website use case, opt in to similar domain opportunities, and submit the inquiry.

tasks.instruction: Use the email subscription form on the parked landing page to sign up an email address for weekly summaries about discounted registrations and expiring premium domains, limited to interests in .com, .net, and .io domains, and submit the preferences.
tasks.name: Use the email subscription form on the parked landing page to sign up an email address for weekly summaries about discounted registrations and expiring premium domains, limited to interests in .com, .net, and .io domains, and submit the preferences.
tasks.description: Use the email subscription form on the parked landing page to sign up an email address for weekly summaries about discounted registrations and expiring premium domains, limited to interests in .com, .net, and .io domains, and submit the preferences.

tasks.instruction: Switch the site language to Spanish and currency to EUR, search for a chosen keyword, then add to your cart the first search result if its price is under €20 (otherwise the second result) and open the cart view.
tasks.name: Switch the site language to Spanish and currency to EUR, search for a chosen keyword, then add to your cart the first search result if its price is under €20 (otherwise the second result) and open the cart view.
tasks.description: Switch the site language to Spanish and currency to EUR, search for a chosen keyword, then add to your cart the first search result if its price is under €20 (otherwise the second result) and open the cart view.

tasks.instruction: From the sponsored hosting links on the parked page, open a hosting offer labeled as a Starter or Basic plan with a monthly price of $5.00 or less, view its detailed plan information, and then return toward the registrar flow.
tasks.name: From the sponsored hosting links on the parked page, open a hosting offer labeled as a Starter or Basic plan with a monthly price of $5.00 or less, view its detailed plan information, and then return toward the registrar flow.
tasks.description: From the sponsored hosting links on the parked page, open a hosting offer labeled as a Starter or Basic plan with a monthly price of $5.00 or less, view its detailed plan information, and then return toward the registrar flow.

tasks.instruction: From the parked landing page, access the WHOIS contact form for the domain, complete it with contact details and a paragraph of at least three sentences asking about purchase terms, request a copy of the message if possible, and send it.
tasks.name: From the parked landing page, access the WHOIS contact form for the domain, complete it with contact details and a paragraph of at least three sentences asking about purchase terms, request a copy of the message if possible, and send it.
tasks.description: From the parked landing page, access the WHOIS contact form for the domain, complete it with contact details and a paragraph of at least three sentences asking about purchase terms, request a copy of the message if possible, and send it.

tasks.instruction: Search for a chosen keyword, add the first domain whose yearly price is more than $10 to your cart, then in the cart apply a promo code that gives a percentage discount on eligible parked-domain registrations and review the updated pricing.
tasks.name: Search for a chosen keyword, add the first domain whose yearly price is more than $10 to your cart, then in the cart apply a promo code that gives a percentage discount on eligible parked-domain registrations and review the updated pricing.
tasks.description: Search for a chosen keyword, add the first domain whose yearly price is more than $10 to your cart, then in the cart apply a promo code that gives a percentage discount on eligible parked-domain registrations and review the updated pricing.

tasks.instruction: After adding a .com domain found via search to your cart, open its privacy settings, compare the available tiers, and select the least expensive option that includes email forwarding before saving your choice.
tasks.name: After adding a .com domain found via search to your cart, open its privacy settings, compare the available tiers, and select the least expensive option that includes email forwarding before saving your choice.
tasks.description: After adding a .com domain found via search to your cart, open its privacy settings, compare the available tiers, and select the least expensive option that includes email forwarding before saving your choice.
